description: best-effort dependency vuln audit (pip-audit / npm audit, read-only)
rules: read-only — never installs or modifies dependencies
best-effort — auditors are optional, absence is a clean no-op
usage: Set PROJECT_DIR. Output: audit_report.json (always written, with a note when no auditor/manifest is found).
limitation: Only pip-audit (requirements*.txt) and npm audit (package.json); both must be on PATH to run.
